overview.description: The 2x Long VIX Futures ETF (UVIX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Long VIX Futures index. The fund tracks an index that provides 2x daily leveraged exposure to a portfolio comprising first- and second-month VIX futures positions with a weighted average maturity of one month. UVIX was launched on Mar 28, 2022 and is issued by Volatility Shares.

holdings.n: US Bank Money Market Deposit Account

data.title: UVIX: One of the Scariest ETFs Around
data.text: UVIX is one of the scariest ETFs around. The fund triggers a red light in the Bloomberg Intelligence Traffic Light system.
